title: Sahasrakund Waterfall
tagline: Sahasrakund Waterfall — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Sahasrakund Waterfall (also Sahastrakund) is a waterfall on the Painganga River of Nanded district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Sahasrakund Waterfall (also Sahastrakund) is a waterfall on the Painganga River of Nanded district, Maharashtra, India. This town is on the boundary of the Yavatmal and Nanded districts on the Painganga River. Sahasrakund situated at a distance 172 km from Yavatmal and 100 km from Nanded. It is also 50 km from Nirmal and 100 km from Adilabad.from Himayatnagar 18 Km only.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sahasrakund Waterfall?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sahasrakund Waterfall is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sahasrakund Waterfall?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (211 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sahasrakund Waterfall?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sahasrakund Waterfall at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sahasrakund Waterfall?
faq.a: Stays in Sahasrakund Waterfall start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sahasrakund Waterfall?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kubeer mandal.
